name: naming a framework in the vision activates its umbrella namespaces in the consult scope
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a dashboard built with Vue" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(c["family_activated"].include?("vue") && c["namespaces"].include?("owasp") && c["namespaces"].include?("web-vitals") ? 0:1)' && echo vision-family-activated 1>&2
